content_body: We totally enjoyed everything! It rained and was cloudy nearly the whole time, but the mountain view made us feel like we were on a quest in a Hobbit movie. When the rain stopped a rainbow appeared and with the sun shining through the clouds it spotlighted parts of the mountains. The cabin was a dream come true. The property was so well kept we felt like we were the first to use it. We were in awe the whole time!
title: Dream Come True!
